summary: Bug fix verified - Cast System Regression in FilmPopup.jsx. Fixed proposal actor cards to show gender icon (♀/♂), star rating, nationality/age/skill/filmcount, green genre badges, amber adaptable genre badge, and expandable Skill button with skill bars.
critical_code_review_comments: The original fix in AgencyActorCardPopup was correct but only applied to user's agency actors (which the test user doesn't have)
The proposal actor cards (from external agencies) had broken gender icon logic (checking 'M'/'F' instead of 'male'/'female') and missing genre badges
Fixed proposal actor cards in FilmPopup.jsx lines 619-635 to match the reference implementation in CastingAgencyPage.jsx
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with film in casting status
context_for_next_testing_agent: The test user has no actors in their agency (effective_actors=[], school_students=[]). To test the AgencyActorCardPopup component, you would need to recruit actors first via POST /api/agency/recruits. The proposal actor cards (from external agencies) are now fixed and showing all required fields.

changes: Fixed gender icon to check 'male'/'female' instead of 'M'/'F'
Added pink-400/cyan-400 colors for gender icons
Added fill-yellow star icons instead of text stars
Added emerald genre badges for strong_genres_names
Added amber genre badge for adaptable_genre_name
Added color-coded skill average (emerald/cyan/amber based on value)

verification.backend_tests: 10/10 passed - all actor data fields verified
verification.frontend_tests: All elements visible in screenshots - gender icons, star ratings, genre badges, skill expansion working
